meaning: n.粗锉刀,擦菜板,刺耳声,激怒人的举动vt.用粗锉刀锉,用擦菜板擦碎,粗声粗气地说vi.粗锉,锉磨,发刺耳声
examples: He was still laughing when he heard the rasp of Rennie's voice.
Time is the sound of the rasp.
He wanted to rasp the surface smooth.
Despite reducing his voice to a rasp in recent years, it had not robbed him of his spirit.
Other important woodworking tools include the ax, the hammer, the plane, the brace, the awl, the router, the rasp.
